name: жӣјжіў (MAMBO)
description: жӣјжіў MAMBO ($MAMBO) is the official memecoin of the internet's most iconic deranged horse meme. Born from China's wildly viral "жӣјжіў" memeвҖ”based on Machikane TannhГӨuser from Uma Musume Pretty DerbyвҖ”MAMBO has galloped across borders to unite a passionate global community of meme lovers, anime fans, and crypto enthusiasts. Fair-launched on Pump.fun with zero presale and zero insider allocation, $MAMBO embodies true community ownership on Solana. With 2026 marking the Chinese zodiac Year of the Horse, MAMBO stands as the ultimate cultural symbol riding a wave of meme energy into a horse-themed supercycle. China named it жӣјжіў. The world calls it MAMBO. The rhythm has officially begun.
